---
title: "Patterns in the Posts"
subtitle: "What 87,146 posts tell you when you stack them up."
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
anchor-sections: false
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  .analytics-section { margin: 2.5rem 0 3rem 0; }
  .lookat {
    font-family: "Libre Caslon Text", serif;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #0A2540;
    border-left: 4px solid #C9A961;
    padding: 0.4rem 0 0.4rem 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  .panel {
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    background: #FBF7EE;
    padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    min-height: 1.5em;
    font-family: "Libre Franklin", sans-serif;
  }
  .panel .title { font-weight: 700; color: #8B1E3F; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .panel .item {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    padding: 0.4rem 0;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
  }
  .panel .ts { color: #6E5A2A; font-size: 0.78rem; margin-right: 0.6rem; }
  .nickname-surfaces {
    margin: 0.4rem 0 0.8rem 0;
  }
  .nickname-surfaces .surface {
    display: inline-block;
    background: #0A2540;
    color: #F4ECD8;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin: 2px 4px 2px 0;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
  }
</style>

## When does he post?

<p class="lookat">Every post since 2009, plotted by hour of the day (Eastern Time) and day of the week. The dark band between 5 AM and 9 AM tells the story.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="clock-heatmap" style="height: 360px;"></div>
  <div id="clock-panel" class="panel" style="display: none;"></div>
</div>

## The storm days

<p class="lookat">Every day, colored by post volume. The bright spots are days he couldn't sleep — hover one to see what set him off.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="storm-calendar" style="height: 420px;"></div>
</div>

## The nickname factory

<p class="lookat">Forty targets, six and a half thousand nicknames. The bar is how often he reached for a label. Click any bar to see what he called them.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="nickname-bars" style="height: 620px;"></div>
  <div id="nickname-panel" class="panel" style="display: none;"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var NAVY = "#0A2540", GOLD = "#C9A961", RED = "#8B1E3F", CREAM = "#F4ECD8";

  function fmtTs(s) {
    if (!s) return "";
    return s.replace("T", " ").substring(0, 16);
  }

  // ---------- 1. Clock heatmap ----------
  fetch("data/temporal.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (t) {
    var data = [{
      z: t.counts,
      x: t.hours,
      y: t.dow_names,
      type: "heatmap",
      colorscale: [
        [0,    "#F4ECD8"],
        [0.15, "#E8D5A3"],
        [0.4,  "#C9A961"],
        [0.7,  "#8B1E3F"],
        [1,    "#0A2540"]
      ],
      hovertemplate: "%{y}, %{x}:00 ET<br><b>%{z}</b> posts<extra></extra>",
      showscale: true,
      colorbar: { title: "posts", thickness: 12, len: 0.8 }
    }];
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 50, l: 50 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: {
        title: "hour of day (Eastern Time)",
        tickmode: "array",
        tickvals: [0, 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21],
        ticktext: ["12a", "3a", "6a", "9a", "12p", "3p", "6p", "9p"],
        tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" }
      },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("clock-heatmap", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });

    var panel = document.getElementById("clock-panel");
    document.getElementById("clock-heatmap").on("plotly_click", function (ev) {
      var pt = ev.points && ev.points[0];
      if (!pt) return;
      var dowIdx = t.dow_names.indexOf(pt.y);
      var key = dowIdx + "," + pt.x;
      var ids = t.samples[key] || [];
      panel.style.display = "block";
      var hr = pt.x;
      var hrLabel = (hr === 0 ? "12 AM" : hr < 12 ? hr + " AM" : hr === 12 ? "12 PM" : (hr - 12) + " PM");
      var html = '<div class="title">' + pt.y + ", " + hrLabel + " ET — " + pt.z + " posts. A few examples:</div>";
      if (!ids.length) {
        html += '<div class="item">(no samples saved for this bucket)</div>';
      } else {
        ids.forEach(function (id) {
          var meta = t.sample_meta[id];
          if (!meta) return;
          html += '<div class="item"><span class="ts">' + fmtTs(meta.ts) + " · " + meta.platform + '</span>' + meta.text + '</div>';
        });
      }
      panel.innerHTML = html;
    });
  });

  // ---------- 2. Storm calendar ----------
  fetch("data/storm_days.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (s) {
    // Group by year, columns = day-of-year
    var byYear = {};
    s.days.forEach(function (d) {
      var y = d.day.substring(0, 4);
      if (!byYear[y]) byYear[y] = {};
      // day-of-year
      var dt = new Date(d.day + "T00:00:00Z");
      var start = Date.UTC(parseInt(y), 0, 1);
      var doy = Math.floor((dt.getTime() - start) / 86400000);
      byYear[y][doy] = d;
    });
    var years = Object.keys(byYear).sort();
    var z = [], hover = [];
    years.forEach(function (y) {
      var row = [], hrow = [];
      for (var doy = 0; doy < 366; doy++) {
        var d = byYear[y][doy];
        if (d) {
          row.push(d.count);
          var theme = d.top_theme || "—";
          var stormBadge = d.storm ? " 🌩️ STORM DAY" : "";
          hrow.push(d.day + "<br>" + d.count + " posts (top theme: " + theme + ")" + stormBadge);
        } else {
          row.push(null);
          hrow.push("");
        }
      }
      z.push(row);
      hover.push(hrow);
    });

    var data = [{
      z: z,
      x: Array.from({length: 366}, function (_, i) { return i; }),
      y: years,
      type: "heatmap",
      colorscale: [
        [0,    "#F4ECD8"],
        [0.05, "#E8D5A3"],
        [0.25, "#C9A961"],
        [0.55, "#8B1E3F"],
        [1,    "#0A2540"]
      ],
      hovertext: hover,
      hovertemplate: "%{hovertext}<extra></extra>",
      showscale: true,
      colorbar: { title: "posts", thickness: 12, len: 0.8 }
    }];
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 40, l: 50 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: {
        title: "day of year",
        tickmode: "array",
        tickvals: [0, 31, 59, 90, 120, 151, 181, 212, 243, 273, 304, 334],
        ticktext: ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"],
        tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" }
      },
      yaxis: { autorange: "reversed", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("storm-calendar", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
  });

  // ---------- 3. Nickname factory ----------
  fetch("data/nicknames.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (n) {
    var labels = n.targets.map(function (t) { return t.target; }).reverse();
    var counts = n.targets.map(function (t) { return t.count; }).reverse();
    var colors = n.targets.map(function (t) { return t.sentiment === "good" ? GOLD : RED; }).reverse();

    var data = [{
      x: counts, y: labels,
      type: "bar", orientation: "h",
      marker: { color: colors },
      hovertemplate: "<b>%{y}</b><br>%{x} nickname uses<extra></extra>"
    }];
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 20, b: 40, l: 200 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { title: "nickname mentions", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("nickname-bars", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });

    var panel = document.getElementById("nickname-panel");
    var byTarget = {};
    n.targets.forEach(function (t) { byTarget[t.target] = t; });

    document.getElementById("nickname-bars").on("plotly_click", function (ev) {
      var pt = ev.points && ev.points[0];
      if (!pt) return;
      var t = byTarget[pt.y];
      if (!t) return;
      panel.style.display = "block";
      var html = '<div class="title">' + t.target + " — " + t.count + " nickname uses (mostly " + t.sentiment + "):</div>";
      html += '<div class="nickname-surfaces">';
      t.surfaces.forEach(function (s) {
        html += '<span class="surface">' + s.surface + ' <small>×' + s.count + '</small></span>';
      });
      html += '</div>';
      if (t.samples && t.samples.length) {
        html += '<div class="title" style="margin-top:0.6rem;">Samples:</div>';
        t.samples.forEach(function (s) {
          html += '<div class="item"><span class="ts">' + fmtTs(s.ts) + " · " + s.platform + '</span>' + s.text + '</div>';
        });
      }
      panel.innerHTML = html;
      panel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "nearest" });
    });
  });
})();
</script>
